fields.bio: Passionate traveler and local host. I aim for a 5-star experience every time. Welcome to my home!
fields.name: Mike

fields.bio: helloo i hope you enjoy your trip
fields.name: stayfinder

fields.title: Entire cabin in Muktinath, Nepal
fields.description:
About this space
A unique Cabin in A frame design; fully furnish with private Kitchen by an alpine lake. View of 6 plus 7000 metres Himalayan peak cannot match by any tranquil getaway Homes away from Home.
We have an ATV for private use on the prepayment option and lot of activities can be arranged perfect for a week holiday. Best for Digital Nomad craving refuge in the Himalayas with necessary amenities delivered to your door step.

Other things to note
Extra cost for extra guest, driver or guide. Should be consulted on arrival or before that. We will cooperate and make best arrangements.

fields.title: Entire rental unit in Lalitpur, Nepal
fields.description: Escape to your private villa retreat in the vibrant heart of Lalitpur, Nepal, offering an inviting blend of comfort and local charm. This lovely unit features two spacious bedrooms and 1.5 modern bathrooms, comfortably accommodating up to five guests for an unforgettable stay. At just $198 per night, it's the perfect home base for exploring the rich culture and beauty of the Kathmandu Valley.

fields.title: Entire home in Rosemead, California, United States
fields.description: Designer 5BR villa in the LA area, perfect for families and groups. Enjoy a resort style backyard with a stunning waterfall pool and relaxing lounge space. Inside features a bright open layout, modern finishes, spacious bedrooms, and a fun game room for entertainment. Fully equipped kitchen for easy meals and gatherings. Located in Rosemead, just minutes to Downtown LA, Pasadena, and top attractions while offering a peaceful stay.

fields.title: Entire rental unit in Sumida-ku, Japan
fields.description:
About this space
Welcome to Hanshe Homestay! Since 2016, we have been committed to creating a home for you in Tokyo that is great value for money.

Explore a different Tokyo with a fusion of Skytree and Shitamachi culture:
Hansher B&B is located in Sumida Ward, Tokyo, just a few steps from Tokyo's new landmark, Skytree, and only 8 minutes by Tobu Skytree Line. You can start from the modern and bustling Skytree area to experience world-class sightseeing spots, shopping malls and gourmet restaurants. Then, you can shuttle through the streets of Tokyo's downtown to explore the lifestyle and local culture of the locals.

LOFT decoration, fully equipped:
Our LOFT room is simple in style, combined with reasonable use of space, so you can enjoy a clean and comfortable living environment. The room is equipped with tables and chairs, Wi-Fi, private bathroom, TV, air conditioning, microwave, etc., which is ideal for home isolation and remote work. Additionally, we provide amenities including: hair dryer, electric kettle, bath towels, shampoo, body wash, conditioner, etc. to ensure you can enjoy the convenience of “light travel”.

Convenient transportation, multiple subway lines:
The B&B is only a 2-minute walk from Zhongyuan Station, where you can take the Skytree Line. It takes 8 minutes from Zhongyuan Station to Asakusa. In addition, the subway is also very convenient to go to popular attractions such as Ueno, Ginza, Shinjuku, Shibuya, Roppongi, etc., and it takes no more than 40 minutes to reach.

If this room is not available, you can click on my profile picture to view our other rooms. Looking forward to providing you with a comfortable and pleasant trip to Tokyo!

The space
— Two-Story LOFT 202 —

ｰ 13 m²
ｰ A/C
ｰ Free WI-FI
ｰ 1 Double Bed (with 1 Tatami Bed on the upper story, if needed)
ｰ TV
ｰ Desk/Chair
ｰ Microwave
ｰ Mini-fridge
ｰ Electric Kettle
ｰ Private Toilet and Bathroom (Bathtub included)


— Life necessities — (Limited Supply During the Pandemic)

- Shampoo/Conditioner/Shower Gel
- Toothpaste (No toothbrush)
- Towel
- Hairdryer

Other things to note
※ Pets are not allowed.

※No smoke.

※ Please do not take away bath towels and other consumables provided by the B&B.

※ Please do not flush anything other than toilet paper. If you flush sanitary napkins, leftover food, hair, etc., we will charge you a fee.

※ Please do not dye your hair during your stay. If the bed sheet, towel, wall, etc. are damaged by contact with hair dye, we will charge you a compensation fee.

※ Please submit an electronic copy of your ID before checking in.

※ Please take care of the items in the house for the next guest to enjoy; if any items are damaged, you will be charged according to the price.

※ Please keep the noise level down after 10pm so as not to disturb the neighbors.

※ Please turn off the power of electrical appliances when you go out.

※ Please take off your shoes at the entrance, hoping that you can respect and like this traditional Japanese culture.

※ Please sort the garbage and throw it in the big white garbage can at the door of the house.

※ If you would like to check in early, please let us know in advance, as a fee may be charged.

※ Please keep your valuables or finances safe. We are not responsible for any loss, misplacement, theft or damage.

※ Cleaning tools (such as vacuum cleaners, mops) are not provided in the house, please bring your own if needed.

※ In order to cooperate with our epidemic prevention and control, if you have visitors, please be sure to inform us in advance.

Registration Details
Hotels and Inns Business Act | 墨田区保健所 | 31墨福衛生環第123号

fields.title: Private room in cabin in Budhanilkantha, Nepal
fields.description: Located near Shivapuri National Park, it is only a 3-minute walk from the Budhanilkantha Temple. With fresh air, clean water, and it is far from the hustle and bustle of the city, offering a peaceful and secluded environment.

fields.title: Starlight Villa in Johor Bahru, Malaysia
fields.description:
About this space
🙋🏼‍♀️Welcome to Starlight Villa - Perfect staycation for friends and families 🏡

📍Starlight Villa is located in Mount Austin, Johor Bahru. Strategy location with a lot of happening restaurants🌮, cafes☕️, shopping malls🛍️, massages💆‍♂️, pubs🍻, saloons💇🏻‍♀️, sports complex🏸 and water theme park🛝 just around the corner. Easy access from Singapore and anywhere in Johor Bahru.

The space
🏡 Single storey corner house (3600 Sqft)
🛏️ 4 Bedrooms
🛁 3 Bathrooms
👫 Accommodate 6-12 pax
🅿️ 2 Car parkings inside, 3-5 parkings outside

🛏️ Bedroom Configuration:
1️⃣ Bedroom 1: 1 x King Bed (Ensuite Bathroom)
2️⃣ Bedroom 2: 2 x Queen Beds (Ensuite bathroom)
3️⃣ Bedroom 3: 2 x Queen Beds
4️⃣ Bedroom 4: 1 x Queen Bed

🎯 Entertainment:
🏊 Private pool
🎤 Karaoke system
🀄️ Mahjong table with tiles
🥅 Football
⚽️ Table soccer
🏒 Table hockey
🍢 Bbq pit
🪑 Outdoor dining
📺 Free Netflix
🎬 Free Disney+
🛜 300mbps WiFi

🍽️ Fully equipped kitchen:
💧Coway hot & cold water purifier
❄️ Fridge
🍲 Microwave
🍳 Pot & pan
🫖 Kettle

✅ Extra touches included:
🧺 2in1 Washing machine & dryer
🛀 Fresh towel & toiletries
🛏️ Clean bed linens

📍Nearby attraction:
🍱 Mount Austin Nanyang Street - 1 min
🛍️ Jaya Grocer Mount Austin - 1 min
🛋️ Aeon Tebrau - 5 mins
🏰 Eco Palladium - 5 mins
🛒 Mid Valley Southkey - 10 mins
🚆 City Square & CIQ - 15 mins
🛍️ KSL City Mall - 15 mins
👗 Johor Premium Outlet - 30 mins
🏄🏻‍♂️ Legoland Medini - 40 mins

📝 House Rules:
🕒 Check-in: 3pm | Check-out: 12pm
🤫 Respect the neighbour hoods quiet hours
⚠️ Parties/events/more than 12pax must get approval from host

🙋🏻Your host🙋🏻‍♀️
Bryce & Miki, your friendly local hosts, speaks Chinese, English and Malay. We ensure smooth communication and a heartfelt welcome for every guest.❤️

🤩 Why Choose Starlight Villa?
🧑‍🧑‍🧒‍🧒 Family-Friendly – All rooms on the ground floor, perfect for kids & elderly
🏊‍♂️ Poolside Living – Living room opens to the pool for fun & safety
🧹 Spotless Clean – Maintained by well-trained cleaners
🕛 12 PM Checkout – More time to relax (others only 11 AM)
🚗 Easy Parking – Spacious & convenient for multiple cars
📍 Great Location – Close to top attractions & essentials

Guest access
🌊Swimming Pool
🎤KTV
🀄️Mahjong
⚽️Table Football
🥅Football Outdoor
🏒Table Hockey
🍢Bbq Pit

Other things to note
🎊For any parties, events, or gatherings with more than 12pax (including non-staying guests), please reach out to us for approval before booking🫱🏼‍🫲🏽

❌Unauthorized large gatherings may result in cancellation without refund💸

📌Guests are kindly reminded to use all amenities responsibly and at their own risk

🛏️Extra floor mattress will be provide on request, there will be an extra charge of RM50 per set mattress

We’re happy to consider special requests—just let us know in advance🤗

fields.title: Room in Melbourne, Australia
fields.description:
Beautiful room with a spacious working desk and a private balcony, located in the very center of Melbourne, next to major transport hubs - trains🚆, trams🚊 & buses🚍 - and attractions - libraries, museums, theaters - yet with its own rooftop garden where one can immerse in soothing greenery 🌱🪴🦋.
The apartment also includes a fully-equiped kitchen 🍳, books 📚, boardgames 🎲, a lounge with 55" 4K TV 📽️, & laundry 🧺.
We look forward to hosting you!

fields.title: Entire home in Long Beach, California, United States
fields.description:
Make some memories at this unique and family-friendly place.
You will enjoy this sunny beach front home on the Peninsula boardwalk while watching amazing sunsets. Experience both the ocean & the bay while visiting our beach house. Located within walking distance to 2nd Street shops & restaurants.

Registration Details
NRP23-01146

fields.title: Private hanok in a traditional market • Gyeongdong Jae • Cheongnyangni Station
fields.description: Discover Gyeongdong Jae, a private hanok beautifully nestled within the vibrant heart of a traditional Korean market, offering an unforgettable cultural escape. This exquisite villa near Cheongnyangni Station seamlessly blends authentic charm with modern luxury, featuring two tranquil bedrooms and two pristine bathrooms. Perfect for up to four guests, it provides an exclusive and stylish retreat to experience the true essence of Seoul living with unparalleled comfort.

fields.title: Entire home in Jeju-si, South Korea
fields.description:
About this space
- Retro emotional private stay with friends and family!
Cheongsu Inn is a private, private accommodation that has been remodeled from a 100-year-old Jeju house where my grandmother has lived for a long time.
Only one team can stay a day, and it is good to stay quietly by adding a retro mood to the structure of Jeju traditional houses. It's great to share new memories with friends and familiar memories with family.

The accommodation is located in the village. The view from the yard is only the barley, the sky, and nature. In April, the view of the barley field in front of the accommodation is particularly impressive. On summer nights, you can also see fireflies in the yard.

- Spacious structure and space for up to 8 people!
Cheongsu Inn is a private accommodation consisting of 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. The standard number of people is 4, and it can be used by up to 8 people, including additional people, so it is suitable for families or friends to stay together.

Enjoy your stay in a variety of ways, including barbecue, fire pit, film camera, and analog camcorder rental.

fields.title: Entire serviced apartment in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
fields.description:
Welcome to your home away from home! A stylish, cozy stay with warm décor and modern touches. Enjoy coffee on the balcony, cook in the full kitchen, or unwind with a movie on the smart TV. Fast Wi-Fi, premium linens, and easy self check-in make your stay simple and comfortable.

Nearby: KLCC Park, Suria KLCC, Pavilion KL, Aquaria KLCC, KL Bird Park & Chinatown.

fields.title: Pension in Jeju-si, South Korea
fields.description:
About this space
* A small discount is applied for consecutive stays *

*Newly opened jacuzzi free review event*

Private private pension surrounded by stone walls in a quiet space in Dumori

Our Staypinda is an accommodation located within 10 minutes from Sinchang Windmill Coastal Road by car, and Hyeopjae and Geumneung Beach are within 20 minutes. (Hanaro Mart 3 minutes, Convenience store 3 minutes)

Up to 4 people can stay, based on 2 people.

In the front yard, there is a fire pit where you can barbecue.
(If you are using it, please let us know in advance.) Additional charge of 30,000 KRW when using)
Barbecue supplies provided (one bag of charcoal, firewood, 1 grate, tongs, scissors, torch, gloves)
(Charcoal/grill not allowed)

The jacuzzi is a cozy space where the moonlight is illuminated in Baekil Hong (30,000 KRW including cleaning fee when using)
* Dead sea salt bath products provided, no personal bath products *

The bedroom is on the loft.

House space - living room, bathroom, loft (bedroom), jacuzzi

A selection of welcome beverages and snacks

Check-in time: after 4pm
Check-out time: 11 am

The space
Guest spaces/facilities:

-Living room & bedroom

Turntable (for Bluetooth speaker)
Beam Projector (Netflix available)
Air conditioner
Wi-Fi
Mattress (queen size)
Bedding (Additional bedding can only be changed and added if requested one day before the reservation date)


-Kitchen

[Cheese crackers, 2 kinds of snacks, popcorn, 2 cups of ramen, 2 coffee capsules, 2 bottles of mineral water, carbonated water, chocolate milk apple juice, lychee jelly juice]

Induction stove
Oven toaster
Electric kettle
Mini fridge
Microwave
Illy coffee machine
4-person tableware set
Other dinner plates
Wine Glasses
Basic seasonings (sugar, seasoned salt, soy sauce, red pepper powder, black pepper)
Other cutlery kitchen utensils


-Bathroom

Shower room
Shampoo, conditioner, body wash, hand wash
shower towel
- Hairdryer
Body towel, face towel
Disposable toothbrush and toothpaste provided
Washing machine (detergent provided)

fields.comment: This place was amazing! Spotlessly clean, beautifully decorated, and had everything I needed for a comfortable stay. The bed was incredibly cozy, the kitchen fully stocked, and the bathroom felt like a spa. The location was perfect—quiet but close to everything. The host was super responsive and helpful. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Will definitely stay again!
